patch.value: Per-query hybrid weight override: pm search --semantic-weight (post-v0.1)
PRD line 1680 defers broader hybrid tuning; hybrid_semantic_weight is global-only. A per-query --semantic-weight lets agents bias keyword-heavy (exact IDs) vs concept-heavy queries.
pm search --mode hybrid --semantic-weight <0..1>; in SEARCH_FLAG_CONTRACTS+MCP+completions; range-validated; falls back to setting; effective value in filters; tests.
